name: Feature request

title: "Feature: <short summary>"
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []

## Problem Statement

What workflow friction or limitation are you solving?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change clearly. Include expected CLI UX and behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

What alternatives did you evaluate and why are they not ideal?

## Scope

- [ ] CLI behavior
- [ ] macOS app behavior
- [ ] docs only
- [ ] tests only

## Verification Plan

How should maintainers validate this change?

```bash
make agent-ci
```

## Additional Context

Examples, prior art, constraints, or linked discussions.
